name: proxychains4
title: proxychains4
description:
redirect connections through socks/http proxies (proxychains-ng)
Proxychains is a UNIX program, that hooks network-related libc functions
in dynamically linked programs via a preloaded DLL (dlsym(), LD_PRELOAD)
and redirects the connections through SOCKS4a/5 or HTTP proxies.
It supports TCP only (no UDP/ICMP etc).
.
This project, proxychains-ng, is the continuation of the unmaintained
proxychains project (known as proxychains package in Debian).

arguments.description: When you don't want to pay for eBorder / premeo socks driver :)
arguments.raw: -in  When you don't want to pay for eBorder / premeo socks driver :)

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use proxychains4 because redirect connections through socks/http proxies (proxychains-ng).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use proxychains4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `proxychains4 --help` as documented upstream for proxychains4.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `proxychains4 [ -f configfile.conf ] <program>` as documented upstream for proxychains4.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair proxychains4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `proxychains4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
